message:
fix(tests): respect CARGO_TARGET_DIR in e2e test harnesses

Update create_fleet_harness and create_hook_harness functions to check
for CARGO_TARGET_DIR environment variable before falling back to the
default target/debug path. This allows e2e tests to find built binaries
when using custom target directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
